title: pelargonium × diminutum
intro: Pelargonium × diminutum, a hybrid of the Pelargonium species, is a flowering plant also known as Dwarf or Miniature Pelargonium. It is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, such as diarrhea and nausea, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and soothe the gut. The health benefits of Pelargonium × diminutum include its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which can help combat infections and promote wound healing. This plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
